questions.question: 1. Which of the following best describes a genome?

answers.a: A single gene of an organism
answers.b: The entire set of genetic material in an organism
answers.c: Only the protein-coding regions of DNA
answers.d: The collection of all RNA molecules in a cell

answers.a: A non-coding region of a gene
answers.b: A coding region of a gene

questions.question: 3. What is the primary goal of genome sequencing?

answers.a: To determine the entire DNA sequence of an organism

questions.question: 4. In eukaryotic cells, where is the genome primarily located?
5. Which field of study combines biology, computer science, and statistics to analyze genomic data?
